## What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] New CVE write-up
- [ ] New detection (KQL / Sigma / Splunk / YARA)
- [ ] New playbook
- [ ] New detection workflow
- [ ] New purple-team lab
- [ ] New threat-intel note (actor / campaign / TTP)
- [ ] New / updated framework or tool page
- [ ] Repo plumbing (CI, config, docs)

## Checklist

- [ ] Used the matching template from `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Mapped to MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs (where applicable)
- [ ] For detections: paired `.kql`/`.yml`/`.spl`/`.yar` with a `.md` sibling (intent / data sources / FPs / tuning)
- [ ] `npx markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md"` passes locally
- [ ] Added a bullet under `CHANGELOG.md` → `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated `TODO.md` (checked off shipped items, added follow-ups)
- [ ] No secrets, samples, or customer data committed
